frame_eqs_str: a['dec_med']=pow(0.9, div(30,a['fps'])); a['dec_slow']=pow(0.995, div(30,a['fps'])); a['beat']=Math.max(Math.max(a['bass'], a['mid']), a['treb']); a['avg']=((a['avg']*a['dec_slow'])+(a['beat']*(1-a['dec_slow']))); a['is_beat']=(above(a['beat'], ((0.5+a['avg'])+a['peak']))*above(a['time'], (a['t0']+0.2))); a['t0']=((a['is_beat']*a['time'])+((1-a['is_beat'])*a['t0'])); a['peak']=((a['is_beat']*a['beat'])+(((1-a['is_beat'])*a['peak'])*a['dec_med'])); a['index']=((a['index']+a['is_beat'])*below(a['index'], 4)); a['q20']=a['avg']; a['q21']=a['beat']; a['q22']=a['peak']; a['q23']=a['index']; a['myvol']=((a['bass_att']+a['treb_att'])+a['mid_att']); a['myvol_s']=(a['myvol_s']+above(a['myvol'], a['myvol_s'])); a['myvol_s']=((0.995*a['myvol_s'])+(0.005*a['myvol'])); a['myvol_s']=Math.min(a['myvol_s'], 15); a['q1']=div((div((a['myvol_s']+(2*(a['bass']+a['treb']))),1000)*30),a['fps']); a['dir']=((a['dir']*0.99)+(0.01*(a['index']-1))); a['dir']=(0.5*(a['index']-2)); a['q2']=(div(a['myvol_s'],3)+1); a['rot']=(0.3*Math.sin(div(a['time'],4)));
